hero.subtitle: Portals, systems and platforms for your business. Tell us what you need — we design and deliver it.
hero.bgSlogan: You imagine it. We build it.

banner.bold: Getting a quote is 100% free, no strings attached.
banner.text: You only pay if you decide to proceed.

possibilities.tag: What AI can do for you
possibilities.subtitle: You don't need to know about technology. Just think about what wastes your time or costs you money — we turn it into a smart solution.

items.title: Task automation
items.desc: Invoicing, data entry, reports, order tracking — everything repetitive can run on its own.
items.example: E.g.: Auto-generate invoices from your order system

items.title: Chatbots & customer support
items.desc: Smart assistants that answer questions, take orders, and solve problems 24/7.
items.example: E.g.: A WhatsApp bot that handles your customers' FAQs

items.title: Data analysis & prediction
items.desc: Dashboards that show trends, predict demand, and help you make better decisions.
items.example: E.g.: Predict which products will run out next week

items.title: Document processing
items.desc: Extract data from invoices, contracts, or forms automatically. No more copy-paste.
items.example: E.g.: Read supplier PDFs and load the data into your system

items.title: Custom internal tools
items.desc: Systems that adapt to how your team works, not the other way around.
items.example: E.g.: A portal where your team logs hours and generates instant reports

items.title: AI strategy for your business
items.desc: We help you identify where artificial intelligence can have the biggest impact on your operation.
items.example: E.g.: Process audit to find automation opportunities

items.label: Guaranteed response in less than a day
Cost to get a quote — always free

steps.title: Describe your idea
steps.desc: No jargon needed. In your own words. Tell us what your business needs.

steps.title: Receive a quote
steps.desc: Free. We send you a proposal with pricing, timeline, and a first mockup.

steps.title: Alpha — First look
steps.desc: If you approve and pay the 50% upfront, you receive a functional first version.

steps.title: Beta & final delivery
steps.desc: You review in beta. The remaining 50% is paid upon final delivery.

items.label: Free quote
items.desc: You receive a complete proposal at no cost or obligation.

items.label: Upfront on approval
items.desc: Upon confirming the project, half is paid to begin development.

items.label: On delivery
items.desc: The remaining balance is paid upon receiving the approved final product.

form.subtitle: Fill out the form and we'll contact you within 24 hours with a personalized proposal.
form.note: Getting a quote is free. There's no cost to receive your proposal. If you decide to proceed, you pay 50% to start and 50% on final delivery.
form.name: Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g.: I need a system where my employees log their hours and I can view weekly reports...
form.successMessage: We'll review your idea and contact you within 24 hours with a completely free proposal.
